hint: for emphasis · verb already carries the subject
*sé* alone is too short — pair with *lo*
spine: debo · more serious than tengo que

front: I don't know what he wants.
I don't know what HE wants.
I don't want to invite him, but she does.
back: No quiero invitarlo, pero ella sí.

front: I want to know what he has.
I, I don't want to invite him, but she does.
back: Yo no quiero invitarlo, pero ella sí.

front: I don't know what SHE wants.
I'm going to try to eat later.
back: Voy a intentar comer más tarde.

hint: cf. pensive · go BACK to *pensar* before changing

front: I want to know what's going on.

hint: e→ie also shows up in noun cousins
*un* in front = noun · same shape as verb form
*una* in front = noun · same shape as verb
two senses · *¿qué tomas?* = what'll you drink?
